ground_truth.title: How to Find a Financial Advisor Book of Business for Sale
ground_truth.author: Michael Belluomini
ground_truth.main_content: Buying another advisor's book of business is a way to immediately grow your assets under management and add new specialty services to your practice. If you're considering an acquisition, chances are you've already got some idea of what you're looking for, the valuation process for setting a price and how you would integrate the two firms. Now it's just the small matter of finding a financial advisor book of business for sale. The typical advisor might only acquire one or two other practices during their career, so most don't have significant experience with this process. Fortunately, finding a deal partner can be easier than you think with the right approach. There are a few strategies for finding a financial advisor book of business for sale, with different strengths and weaknesses. Section 1 covers listing services like FA Match, FP Transitions, Succession Link, and Successions Resource Group, which provide immediate access to books of business on the market but face high competition. Section 2 discusses cold marketing to advisors directly, recommending quality over quantity with personalized, handwritten notes. Section 3 explains the benefits of using your broker-dealer's internal listing service, which has less competition and simpler transitions. Section 4 covers getting referrals from RIA business development teams like Carson Group. Section 5 emphasizes building relationships within your community and niche by attending industry events and asking about succession plans. Section 6 highlights large national conferences as opportunities to meet advisors. The article concludes that by utilizing a mix of strategies, you can start building a channel of leads that will lead to your next acquisition of a financial advisor book of business for sale.
with: Buying another advisor's book of business is a way to immediately grow your assets under management and add new specialty services to your practice.
There are a few strategies for finding a financial advisor book of business for sale, with different strengths and weaknesses.
The main advantage of using a listing service is the immediate access to books of business on the market.
Business development services like Carson Group can have their own M&A divisions that are actively looking to acquire books of business.
By utilizing a mix of strategies, you can start building a channel of leads that will lead to your next acquisition of a financial advisor book of business for sale.
